description_long: This stool features a sleek, modern design with a round, flat blue seat supported by a single, tapered pedestal base. The pedestal narrows as it descends from the seat, then flares out into a wide, circular black base for stability. The seat and upper pedestal are a vibrant blue, while the lower pedestal and base are finished in glossy black, creating a striking two-tone appearance. The stool lacks a backrest and footrest, emphasizing its minimalist aesthetic. Its smooth surfaces and clean lines make it suitable for contemporary urban environments such as cafes, bars, or public plazas. The materials appear to be molded plastic or fiberglass for the seat and pedestal, with a metal or heavy plastic base for added weight and durability.
description: A modern, blue round-seated stool with a single tapered pedestal and a wide black circular base, featuring a minimalist, sleek design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the round blue seat, tapered blue pedestal, and wide black base clearly.
description_view_1: Side view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the smooth transition from seat to base.
description_view_2: Rear view maintains the same features, with the blue seat and pedestal and black base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the consistent, symmetrical design of the stool.
